user.title: Panasonic TaiSEIA (Local)
user.description: Control AC, dehumidifier, and refrigerator over LAN via UPnP SetSaanet / TaiSEIA 101. Discover automatically or enter an IP.

discover.title: Select discovered device
discover.description: Scanned LAN port 57223 and SSDP. Choose a device to add.

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter the LAN IP of a CZ-T006 module.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check the IP and port 57223.
error.no_devices: No devices found. Try manual IP entry, or confirm HA is on the same LAN.
